hypotheses.reason: Right plateau remained in `reference-tables-only`, which still points at asset-delivery or capture timing.
The plateau event counts diverge materially even though both sessions reached interfaces.
Runtime traces do not show a strong post-asset settle difference yet.

summary.recommendation: Local cache diverges from live JS5. Refresh the cache with `run-tool cache-downloader`, then rerun `run-tool checksum-table-compare`.
Live JS5 did not provide a prefetch table. Treat this result as advisory-only and verify with wire captures if prefetch behavior matters.

verdict.recommendation: The client reached JS5 bootstrap but never progressed beyond reference tables. Focus on scene/prefetch gating and the first asset-delivery transition after rebuild.
